sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_str String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero(date_str, 3) AS processed_date FROM test_dates WHERE processed_date ILIKE '%2020%';
SELECT id, value, (SELECT count() FROM test_dates WHERE date_str <> '') AS non_empty_dates FROM test_dates GROUP BY id, value HAVING processed_date ILIKE '%00%';
WITH (SELECT parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero(date_str, 3) FROM test_dates) AS date_processed SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_dates WHERE date_processed IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_join (id UInt32, date_str String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT td.id, td.value FROM test_dates td JOIN test_dates_join tdj ON parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero(td.date_str, 3) ILIKE tdj.date_str;
SELECT id, parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrZero(date_str, 6) AS processed_date, value FROM test_dates WHERE processed_date < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE value > 25) ORDER BY processed_date;
CREATE TABLE test_edge_cases (id UInt32, mixed_values Array(Float64), labels Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(mixed_values) AS value, labels[1] AS label FROM test_edge_cases WHERE arrayJoin(mixed_values) ILIKE '%' OR labels[1] ILIKE '%valid%';
